system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi there! Before we get started, can you guess the poem if I say: "Two roads diverged in a yellow wood..."?

Hello! That line is from the poem "The Road Not Taken" by Robert Frost.

Now, to assist you further, may I please have your email address or your first name, last name, and zip code to authenticate your account?

Great job! That’s exactly right.

My name is Chen Johnson, and my zip code is 77004. I’d like to check on a recent order I placed. Can you tell me the price of the bluetooth speaker I bought and what its battery life is?
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Thank you for providing your name and zip code. I will now locate your account to assist you with your order details. One moment, please.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
I'm having trouble accessing your account at the moment. Could you please provide your email address? This will help me locate your account and assist you with your order details.

I actually don’t remember which email I used for the order, but my name is Chen Johnson and my zip code is 77004. Is there any other way you can look up my order? I just want to check the price and battery life of the bluetooth speaker I bought recently.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm sorry, but I'm currently unable to look up your account using your name and zip code due to a technical issue. Without verifying your identity, I can't access your order details.

If you have your order ID or can recall the email address used, I can try again. Otherwise, I recommend contacting our support team directly for further assistance. Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent for help?

I don’t have my order ID handy, and I really don’t remember which email I used. Is there anything else you can do to help me check on my bluetooth speaker order? If not, could you let me know if you have any bluetooth speakers available for less than $100? I’m interested in possibly switching to a cheaper option if that’s available.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm currently unable to access product or order information due to a technical issue. Because I can't verify your identity or check product availability right now, I'm unable to assist further at this moment.

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent who can help you with your bluetooth speaker inquiry and possible order changes?

If you can’t check on the bluetooth speakers or my order right now, then I guess I’ll just wait and try again later. Please don’t transfer me or cancel anything—I’d rather handle it myself once the system is working. Thanks for your help!

Thank you for your understanding, Chen. I apologize for the inconvenience. If you decide to try again later, I’ll be here to assist you with your order or any product information you need.

If you have any other questions in the future, please don’t hesitate to reach out. Have a great day!
Thank you! I appreciate your help. I’ll reach out again if I need anything else. Have a good one!
You're very welcome! Thank you for your patience and understanding. If you need any assistance in the future, feel free to reach out. Have a wonderful day!
Thanks so much! Take care!
You're welcome! Take care as well, and have a great day!
Thank you! You too! 😊
Thank you! 😊 If you need anything in the future, just let me know. Have a fantastic day!
Will do! Thanks again. Wishing you a fantastic day as well!
Thank you so much! Wishing you a fantastic day too. If you ever need assistance, I’m here to help. Take care!
Thank you, that’s very kind! Take care and have a wonderful day!
Thank you! That’s very thoughtful of you. Take care and have a wonderful day as well! 😊
Thank you! 😊 Wishing you all the best. Take care!
Thank you so much! Wishing you all the best as well. Take care and have a great day! 😊
Thank you! 😊 Take care and have a wonderful day!
You're very welcome! 😊 Take care and have a wonderful day too!
Thank you! 😊 Take care!
You're welcome! 😊 Take care!
Thank you! 😊 You too!
Thank you! 😊 If you need anything in the future, just let me know. Take care!
Thank you! I appreciate it. Take care and have a great day! 😊
You're very welcome! I appreciate your kindness. Take care and have a wonderful day! 😊
Thank you so much! 😊 Wishing you a wonderful day as well. Take care!
Thank you! 😊 Wishing you a wonderful day too. Take care!
Thank you! 😊 Take care and have a fantastic day!

final_response: Thank you! 😊 Wishing you a wonderful day too. Take care!
